roadmaps.title: Production-Safe Developer Roadmap
steps: Practice bug triage before choosing a fix.
Use tests and logs as evidence before release.
Learn rollback planning and post-incident documentation.

roadmaps.title: Evidence-Based QA Roadmap
steps: Classify severity using user impact and reproducibility.
Prioritize regression scope around risky changes.
Write clear evidence that helps teams act quickly.

roadmaps.title: Safe Triage Communicator Roadmap
steps: Identify red flags and escalate safely.
Communicate uncertainty without diagnosing inside the game.
Document observations and handoff clearly.

roadmaps.title: Safety-First Site Lead Roadmap
steps: Use inspection order and material checks before approval.
Document unsafe findings instead of absorbing pressure.
Escalate structural or material risk immediately.

roadmaps.title: Constraint-Aware Architect Roadmap
steps: Clarify client needs before design excitement takes over.
Balance space, accessibility, safety, and budget.
Explain trade-offs visually and professionally.

roadmaps.title: Audit-Safe Back Office Roadmap
steps: Validate duplicates before bulk updates.
Protect private data and keep an audit trail.
Clean data with repeatable checks, not guesswork.

roadmaps.title: Scope-Control Project Manager Roadmap
steps: Separate urgency from priority.
Protect scope with documented trade-offs.
Escalate risks early without creating panic.

roadmaps.title: Ethical HR Decision Roadmap
steps: Use structured evidence for interviews and feedback.
Detect bias before it becomes a decision.
Keep candidate communication respectful and legal-safe.
